Welcome







My name is Farah Ali Dodeen, a passionate Computer Engineering student at Palestine Technical University – Kadoorie. I come from a beautiful rural area near the city of Dura, located in the Hebron District, Palestine. I have a strong interest in programming, software development, and technology in general.
